title: LazyCube
description: A Fabric 1.21.1 Cobblemon modpack focused on exploration, town building, professions, and multiplayer progression toward becoming an Arena Champion or Pokémon Master. Best played on the official server. Closed beta.
body:
LazyCube is a Fabric 1.21.1 modpack built around Cobblemon, designed to provide a relaxed but engaging multiplayer experience focused on exploration, progression, and community building.

Players can explore a world filled with hundreds of biomes, new structures, and many Pokémon, while working toward long-term goals such as becoming an Arena Champion or a Pokémon Master.

Although the modpack can be played in singleplayer, it is primarily designed to be experienced on the official LazyCube server.
